purpose: W40-INFRA-1: re-probe .101 Ollama listener and .248 reachability

192.168.12.191.notable: qwen3.5:35b 23.9GB 36.0B MoE Q4_K_M; qwen2.5:14b-32k extended-context variant available

192.168.12.101.http_api_tags: Empty reply from server / Connection reset by peer (5/5 attempts)
192.168.12.101.verdict_w40_infra_1: TCP-up + HTTP-broken at the Ollama layer; the host network stack has fully recovered (a strict improvement over W39's 100% packet loss end-state); the Ollama listener accepts the TCP connection but immediately closes (RST/Empty reply) before sending any HTTP bytes; restoration requires SSH credentials still unavailable in this environment
192.168.12.101.delta_from_w39: W39 end-state was 100% packet loss + TCP timeout; W40 re-probe shows ping responsive + TCP succeeded + HTTP still broken. Strict topology-layer improvement; live-inference layer still bounded.
192.168.12.101.notable: the host has rebooted or its network stack has recovered between the W39 and W40 milestones; the Ollama service was not restarted (no SSH access)

192.168.12.248.ping_status: 100% packet loss (32nd milestone in a row)
192.168.12.248.verdict: Host remains ARP-incomplete; historical Mac-2 stale pin; carried forward unchanged

summary.w40_infra_1_description: .101 Ollama HTTP listener returns Empty reply / Connection reset under any HTTP request; SSH credentials unavailable to restart the Ollama service; the host itself is TCP-up + ping-up (a strict improvement over W39's end-state)
summary.models_pulled_rationale: the W40 cross-host response-heterogeneity mechanism is closed-form and capsule-layer; it does not require any new live infrastructure to evaluate at the synthetic-bench layer; existing model inventory on localhost and .191 already supports the bounded live W37/W38/W39 xllm probe surface; pulling new models would not materially improve W40 blocker removal
summary.w39_c_multi_host_status: partially discharged at the topology layer (.101 TCP-up); still open at the live-inference layer (.101 Ollama HTTP-broken); hardware-bounded
summary.w40_c_multi_host_status: stronger partial discharge than W39 (ping fully recovered); still open at live-inference layer; carries W40-INFRA-1 forward
